---
title: "Modal Verbs"
description: |
  In this lesson, we will discuss the what modal verbs are and how they are used in German.
author:
  - Will Gammerdinger
date: 2026-05-30
categories: 
  - German
  - Modal verbs
keywords:
  - können
  - mögen
  - müssen
  - dürfen
  - wollen
  - sollen
license: "CC BY-SA 4.0"
license-url: "https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0/"
editor_options: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
---
